docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SABARIA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SUNHA YOON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SABARIA INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOTO HEYDAYIAN AUTHORIZED AGENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $21.00) SERVED MAY-13-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SABARIA INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY YOON, SUNHA AS TO DEFENDANT SABARIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YOON, SUNHA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOON, SUNHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SABARIA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
